name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/server-git
description: MCP server for Git operations — clone, commit, diff, log, and branch management

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status of a git repository

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show changes between commits or working tree

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Create a new commit with staged changes

tools.name: git_clone
tools.description: Clone a repository to a local directory
